name: Xiahou Bo
page_title: Xiahou Bo 夏侯博 [Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Xiahou Bo served as an officer in Liu Bei’s army, and was captured by Cao Cao in AD 200. This entry, from Sanguozhi (Wei 1) is the only historic entry available to us about Xiahou Bo, and it is unknown what happened to him after capture. Still, to have been mentioned, Xiahou Bo was likely an officer of relevance.

sections.short-biography: In 200, Cao Cao captured him after defeating Liu Bei.

full_text:
Xiahou Bo 夏侯博
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Bo (夏侯博). In 200, Cao Cao captured him after defeating Liu Bei. Xiahou Bo was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Xiahou Bo served as an officer in Liu Bei’s army, and was captured by Cao Cao in AD 200. This entry, fromSanguozhi(Wei 1) is the only historic entry available to us about Xiahou Bo, and it is unknown what happened to him after capture. Still, to have been mentioned, Xiahou Bo was likely an officer of relevance.
